name: 长生契
overview: Ning Changyue and Song Yiqiu share a deep, timeless connection that spans three thousand years. In the present day, their journey to understand love, belonging, and eternity is complicated by the resurfacing of a long-buried past and unresolved fates. Facing the echoes of history and the trials of the modern world, they must make pivotal choices that define their love and ultimate home.
